component.name: dough
component.summary: A frosted, cross-platform PySide6 app base

description.p: dough is a fork-and-own application base for PySide6 desktop apps: a frosted, KDE-native window chrome, a token-driven design system with live re-theming, and the cross-platform scaffolding (single-instance, notifications, autostart, power inhibition) every app otherwise re-implements. Fork it, set your identity once, and build your app on a finished base.

ul.li: Frosted chrome — A frameless, blurred, KDE-native window — rounded corners, a custom title bar, edge-resize and drag.
Token-driven design — One palette source with live re-theming, exported to JSON the app and the landing page share.
Batteries, wired — Single-instance, notifications, autostart and power inhibition — cross-platform and already plumbed.
Fork and own — Set your identity once. No upstream dependency, no framework lock-in — the code is yours.
